name: TRUTH-MD
description: A WhatsApp bot built with Node.js using the Baileys library.

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session ID (must start with TRUTH-MD:~). Get one at truthsite.courtneytech.xyz

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Used for session persistence across dyno restarts. Add the Heroku Postgres add-on.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + (e.g. 254101150748)

APP_URL.description: Your Heroku app URL (e.g. https://my-truth-md.herokuapp.com). Used for self-ping to prevent eco dyno sleep. Optional — bot still works without it.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name (e.g. my-truth-md). Used as fallback for self-ping if APP_URL is not set. Optional.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Optional. Only needed if you have replaced the relay with a direct private GitHub repo. Leave blank for standard deployments.
